matin.quote: I came in as a first year who knew no one. Now I am in two committees, I won a hackathon and I know half the program. SIT makes your studies.

idil.quote: At the Events committee I set up socials for 100+ people. That goes on your CV and in your friend group. Way more useful than it sounds.
idil.highlight: CV and in your friend group

hugo.quote: Giving workshops through EduCo gave me the nerve to stand in front of a room. Best skill I picked up here.

riley.quote: Game Night became my fixed Friday. The D&D campaign has been running for a whole year.

discord.msg2: it is literally {price} for a whole year
discord.msg3: say less, I am already in
